seo.title: Hip Hop Abs Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Rev up your metabolism with Hip Hop Abs. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

data.descriptionShort: No sit ups. No crunches. Burn calories and have fun with these hip dance moves.
data.descriptionLong: Shaun T shares his exclusive training techniques that target every section of your abs. You’ll get 3 of the hottest hip-hop dance routines that will rev up your metabolism and get you quick results.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells or Weighted Gloves, Yoga Mat*
modules.categories: Dance, Cardio, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss, Core

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: BODi’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Lucilya W. lost 28 pounds doing Hip Hop Abs®!
modules.testimonial: My self-esteem has risen tremendously because I feel more confident with myself
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort.
